mapper.select: select * from course_evaluation where schedule_id = #{scheduleId} and student_id = #{studentId} limit 1

select e.*, c.course_name, u.real_name as student_name from course_evaluation e left join course_info c on e.course_id = c.id left join sys_user u on e.student_id = u.id where e.teacher_id = #{teacherId} order by e.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into course_evaluation (schedule_id, course_id, student_id, teacher_id, evaluation_score, evaluation_content) values (#{scheduleId}, #{courseId}, #{studentId}, #{teacherId}, #{evaluationScore}, #{evaluationContent})
